ec2.trafficmirrortarget.Description.Description: The description of the Traffic Mirror target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.NetworkInterface.Description: The network interface ID that is associated with the target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.NetworkLoadBalan.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Network Load Balancer that is associated with the target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.Tags.Description: The tags to assign to the Traffic Mirror target.
